---
title: "Brand Colors Test"
format: revealjs
revealjs-plugins:
  - editable
---

## Test Brand Colors

::: {.editable}
Edit this text and check the color picker - it should show brand colors (coral, teal, navy, gold, purple, mint) plus black and white.
:::

## Another Slide

::: {.editable}
More editable text to test with.
:::
